hero.label: Gallery
hero.title: Hidden car defects: real inspection cases
hero.subtitle: Body damage, mileage fraud, hidden accidents. How to recognise a crashed or repainted car. Real examples from BMW, Volkswagen, Audi, Mercedes inspections.

cta.title: Don't be the next one
cta.text: A pre-purchase car inspection protects against costly mistakes. Get in touch before you buy.
